title: Run conversation
startBlockedTooltip: Resolve the errors listed above before starting
subjectPlaceholder: Evaluate whether the company should open-source its internal agent framework.
objectivePlaceholder: What should the agents ultimately produce or decide?
contextPlaceholder: Background the agents should know before they start.
quickStartHint: Each quick start sets the environment and style below. It won't change your turn limits or topic.
savePresetLabel: Save current options as a preset
tonePlaceholder: e.g. energetic, formal, playful — blank uses each agent's own tone
chitchatAllow: Allow — use each agent's own style
chitchatDisallow: Disallow — concise, strict, and factual only
languageAgentDefault: Agent default — keep each agent's language
temperaturePlaceholder: Blank uses each agent's own temperature
timeoutPlaceholder: Blank uses each agent's own timeout
failureHelp: Transient errors are auto-retried first. An agent that keeps failing is removed from the circuit after the set number of failures (0 = never) — the rest of the run continues without it. Removal needs “Skip” or “Ask me” mode; “Stop” ends the run on the first hard failure.
reachable: {{n, number}} agent(s) reachable from the starting agent.
